name: Judge Mode runs a self-narrating briefing that puts the checker on trial
description: A 'judge mode' control opens a guided, self-narrating briefing overlay that steps through the loop's story and reaches a beat where the app shows its checker contradicting itself (status blocked vs an agent verdict of PASS) with links to the upstream issue and PRs; the overlay closes and returns to the dashboard.

planSteps.description: Verify the page header presents the idea as 'the brief: build the loop' followed by a large line 'so we pointed the loop at itself', and the dashboard ring and iteration log are present below it
Click the 'judge mode' button in the stats area to start the guided briefing
Verify a full-screen briefing dialog opens over the dimmed dashboard, showing a first beat titled about the app being its own build log with the number of iterations
Advance the briefing forward four times using its next control until the 'Checker On Trial' beat
Verify a beat appears contrasting the checker's status 'blocked' against an agent conclusion of 'PASS', mentioning failedStepIndex null, with links to a GitHub issue (#208) and pull requests
Close the briefing (its close control or Escape)
Verify the briefing dialog is dismissed and the normal dashboard (ring, iteration log, audit trail) is visible and interactive again
